meaning: n.回想,记忆,问候,纪念品,记忆力
examples: The cenotaph stands as a remembrance of those killed during the war.
A service was held in remembrance of local soldiers killed in the war.
He wept like a child at the remembrance.
Eleven times, we have paused in remembrance, in reflection, in unity and in purpose.
In 164 cases, remains were recovered and dispersed in the garden of remembrance, following instructions received.
